name: multi-agent
description: 多智能体协作桌面应用

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n python,web,electron "npm run dev:python" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on http://localhost:8000/health && wait-on tcp:5173 && tsc -p tsconfig.node.json && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron dist-electron/main.js
scripts.pack: npm run build && npm run build:python && electron-builder
scripts.pack:linux: npm run build && npm run build:python && electron-builder --linux
scripts.pack:win: npm run build && npm run build:python && electron-builder --win
scripts.pack:mac: npm run build && npm run build:python && electron-builder --mac
